emails.subject: RE: PRM matrix
emails.body: RE: PRM matrix Jeff: Per Sue's request, attached is the matrix Masha Arefieva (works with Lisa Yoho) and I put together. As Sue has probably told you, it is more of a "comprehensive snapshot" than a complete product. We welcome your input. Thanks! Jennifer
